allow: PowerShell($names = @\('01_kakao_playmcp_rules','02_product_spec','03_tool_contracts','04_ux_interaction','05_working_agreement','06_decision_log','07_progress'\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $root = "C:\\Users\\user\\Claude\\Projects\\kakaomcp1-kpass\\$n.md"; $doc = "C:\\Users\\user\\Claude\\Projects\\kakaomcp1-kpass\\docs\\$n.md"; $a = Get-FileHash $root -Algorithm MD5; $b = Get-FileHash $doc -Algorithm MD5; $same = if \($a.Hash -eq $b.Hash\) { 'IDENTICAL' } else { 'DIFFERENT' }; Write-Output "$n : $same" })
